# UIListSeparatorConfiguration.Visibility.automatic

**Case**

The collection view list section automatically determines the visibility of the separator.

## Declaration

```swift
case automatic
```

## Constants

- **UIListSeparatorConfiguration.Visibility.hidden**: The list separator is hidden.
- **UIListSeparatorConfiguration.Visibility.visible**: The list separator is visible.
